name: Action Items
description: Extracts a clean, assignable list of action items from the meeting.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List all concrete action items agreed during the meeting. For each item give the owner, the task, the due date if one was stated, and a reference to the transcript segment or timestamp where it was agreed.

sections.title: Unassigned / Needs Owner
sections.instruction: List tasks or follow-ups that were mentioned but do not yet have a clear owner.
